body:
### Features
- **@modelcontextprotocol/sdk:** Add tracing for MCP server requests and client operations [#8916](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8916)
- **General:** Sample event loop delay per iteration on Node 26.5+ [#9273](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9273)
- **LLM Observability:** Propagate session_id to following spans and across services [MLOB-7756] [#9279](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9279)

### Fixes
- **AppSec:** Instrument cookie parseCookie for cookie >=1.1 [#9272](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9272)
- **AppSec:** Log the error when the native WAF binding fails to load [#9288](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9288)
- **AppSec:** Suppress informational responses after blocking requests [#9290](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9290)
- **azure:** Enable Web Crypto on Node 18 [#9311](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9311)
- **azure-functions:** Fix span links and missing telemetry for non-HTTP triggers [#9278](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9278)
- **General:** Handle invalid programmatic option values [#9312](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9312)
- **graphql:** Honor errorExtensions on the mercurius request span [#9284](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9284)
- **OpenTelemetry:** Wire span processors passed to the provider constructor [#9285](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9285)
- **Test Optimization:** Do not mark unchanged tests as impacted [#9314](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9314)
- **Test Optimization:** Handle disabled tests in serial retries [#9313](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9313)
- **Test Optimization:** Omit empty FTR capture containers [#9304](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9304)

### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking)
- **AppSec:** Deflake api-security telemetry metrics integration tests [#9303](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9303)
- **General:** Select version targets by Node.js runtime [#9306](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9306)
- **lint:** Revert editorconfig checker from npm to docker [#9315](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9315)
- **OpenTelemetry:** Deflake OTLP metrics HTTP export test with fake timers [#9287](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9287)
- **readme:** Update eol column for v5 [#9267](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9267)


[MLOB-7756]: https://datadoghq.atlassian.net/browse/MLOB-7756?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiNWRkNTljNzYxNjVmNDY3MDlhMDU5Y2ZhYzA5YTRkZjUiLCJwIjoiZ2l0aHViLWNvbS1KU1cifQ
